overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia jogging along a forest trail on a clear summer day. The character travels through dense pine woodland, passes a traveler on the path, and approaches ancient stone ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail through dense pine woodland

agents.ego_description: Geralt jogging steadily along the dirt path through the forest, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail with patches of grass and small rocks
tall evergreen trees forming a dense forest canopy
tall evergreen trees lining the right side of the trail
green grass and low bushes alongside the trail
green grass and ferns growing beside the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt runs along a winding dirt trail through a dense pine forest on a bright summer day. The path is surrounded by tall evergreen trees and green underbrush, with dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy.

events.description: Geralt approaches and passes a traveler walking in the opposite direction along the narrow path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues jogging along the path, maneuvering past a traveler coming from the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: traveler in simple peasant clothing walking toward Geralt along the forest path

segments.scene_description: While jogging through the forest, Geralt encounters a traveler walking in the opposite direction. The two pass each other on the narrow dirt trail surrounded by dense pine trees and underbrush.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail approaching ancient stone ruins

events.description: stone wall and ancient ruins become visible on the right side as the path opens slightly

agents.ego_description: Geralt jogging toward a stone structure in the distance, passing a villager near the wall

notable_agents.action: villager standing near a wooden post on the left side of the path

entered.detail: low stone wall running parallel to the path, partially covered in moss
ancient stone structure visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The forest trail continues toward ancient stone ruins visible in the distance. A low stone wall runs along the right side of the path, and a villager stands near the left edge as Geralt approaches the archaeological site.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding forest trail that gradually transitions from dense woodland into an area of ancient stone ruins. It begins with Geralt jogging through a thick pine forest, where dappled summer sunlight filters through a canopy of tall evergreens and green underbrush. As he continues along the narrow dirt path, the camera captures him passing a traveler walking in the opposite direction. The scene then opens up as the trail leads toward distant archaeological remains, with a low stone wall appearing along the right side of the path. Finally, the camera approaches the ruins, passing a villager standing at the edge of the trail as the forest gives way to the stone structures.
